candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total because REVT should use a single reported revenue label and later code can fall back across labels.
Duplicate top-line total matching Revenue across years; useful as secondary priority label if naming changes.

variables.notes: Selected the two semantically correct revenue labels as priority list, with Revenue first and duplicate Total Revenue second.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service input costs on the income statement; balance sheet Raw Materials is not an expense line.

variables.notes: Chose the income-statement expense row representing direct costs.

candidates.why: Operating overhead/personnel cost component above operating profit; suitable SG&A component.
Broad overhead bucket above operating profit; excludes finance/tax and is appropriate SG&A coverage.
Dedicated R&D line above operating profit. Per rules, include in XSGA as well when separately reported so XSGA-XRD removes it.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal exists. Selected overhead components above operating profit. Included Research and development costs in XSGA as well because it is separately reported and PROF uses XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line, reported on the income statement and appearing above operating profit in the sheet order.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on debts and borrowings
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on borrowings; preferred granular financing cost component.
Recurring interest cost related to lease liabilities; should be included with interest expense components.
Recurring finance cost bucket; include when granular recurring components are selected and exclude FX/fair value items separately listed.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on debts and borrowings

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost rows and excluded total Financial expenses because it includes Foreign Exchange Losses. Also excluded FX and fair value items as non-interest finance items.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of parent company
candidates.why: Best book equity measure excluding non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting when MIB is added separately.
Valid fallback only if parent-attributable equity were unavailable, but here parent equity exists and is preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of parent company

variables.notes: Selected parent-attributable equity to exclude NCI from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line; preferred over income-statement allocation rows.
Possible alternate label, but appears empty in preview while Non-controlling interests is populated.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet NCI labels as priority list, with populated Non-controlling interests first and Minority Interest as fallback if used in other years.
